codeReview.summary: The integration test assertion fixes close all previously blocking validation gaps: selective hash-gating behavior is now asserted per-node, custom DB path coverage now includes enrich via dry-run, and cross-language edge checks now prove language-boundary edges exist.

issues.description: Test helper still hardcodes `/Users/kjackowski/.factory/bin` into PATH, which remains environment-specific and can reduce portability.

sharedStateObservations.observation: A machine-specific PATH entry remains in integration test command helper, indicating portability conventions are still not consistently enforced in test utilities.

summary: Reviewed fix-integration-test-assertions for commit 8fdd834; all three prior blocking issues from cross-area-integration are resolved, so scrutiny verdict is pass.
